title: The Mad Shrine
lines: You hug the cavern wall and step off the ledge into a vast chamber with twisted, non-Euclidean geometry. The angles make your eyes hurt.
In the center of the room sits an abandoned stone altar.
Engraved deeply into the green stone below horrible, alien symbols reads exactly this: 'He that sleeps will never die.'
Behind the altar, a swirling tear in reality hums with an unnerving, amethyst light.

options.desc: Stand and try to decipher the alien symbols on the walls
Approach the swirling amethyst tear in reality
